title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 4
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two students talking about a photography club.
items.audio_script: Boy: Are we still meeting in the computer room for photography club? I thought I remembered correctly, but I have not checked my messages today. || Girl: That was the original plan, but the computers are being replaced this week. [1]We need to meet in the art room instead[/1]. || Boy: That was lucky; I almost went there. I would have gone to the wrong place and wondered where everyone was. || Girl: Do not worry. I will arrive ten minutes early, so look for me near the entrance. Keep your phone on in case anything changes again.
items.question: Where will the photography club meet?
items.explanation: Photography club will meet in the art room.

items.context: You hear two friends planning a day at the beach.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you packed for the day at the beach yet? I put a football in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Boy: That was on the first list, but it will be very sunny and there are games there already. [1]Everyone needs to bring sun cream now[/1]. || Girl: I am glad I checked. I was about to leave my bag by the door and forget about it. || Boy: There is still time. Put it in now, and check the final message once more before we leave tomorrow morning.
items.question: What should the speaker take?
items.explanation: The speaker should take sun cream.

items.context: You hear two friends changing their evening plans.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still eating at the new cafe tonight? I told my sister I would be home later, so I need to know. || Man: That was the idea, but the cafe is closed for a private party. [1]We are going to cook at my house instead[/1]. || Woman: That is fine with me. I nearly paid for the other activity online this morning. || Man: It is lucky that you checked first. I will book our places this evening and send you the time. We can meet at the bus stop after lunch.
items.question: What will they do tonight?
items.explanation: They will cook at home instead.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a train journey.
items.audio_script: Man: I need to write down the time for the train to Brighton. Is it still at quarter to one, like you said yesterday? || Woman: No, work on the railway has delayed all trains by fifteen minutes. [1]It starts at one o'clock now[/1], although we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Man: Thanks; I nearly wrote down the wrong time. I would have been waiting there at the wrong time. || Woman: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there will not be time to go home again before it begins.
items.question: When does their train leave?
items.explanation: Their train leaves at one o'clock.

items.context: You hear two teenagers talking about a bicycle.
items.audio_script: Girl: How are you getting on with your bicycle? I heard it was not working properly. || Boy: I first thought one of the tyres was flat, and my brother wondered if the brakes were too loose. But he checked it carefully last night. [1]The chain keeps coming off whenever I ride it[/1]. || Girl: Can it be fixed before the cycling trip next week? || Boy: I think so. We know what is wrong now, and the repair shop said it should be ready tomorrow afternoon. That is a relief because I need it this weekend.
items.question: What is the problem with the bicycle?
items.explanation: The bicycle has a problem with its chain.

items.context: You hear two friends arranging a visit to a museum.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are you still travelling to the museum by bicycle? I could meet you when you arrive. || Man: I planned to, but your tyre is still flat. I considered going by car, but the museum car park is always full. [1]I am going by bus instead[/1]. || Woman: That sounds like the best plan. What time will you get there? || Man: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I have already checked the timetable online, so it should be easy. I will message you when I leave, so you do not have to wait outside.
items.question: How will the speaker travel to the museum?
items.explanation: The speaker will go by bus.

items.context: You hear two people talking about food for a picnic.
items.audio_script: Man: Did you buy a cake for the picnic? I saw one in the shop window yesterday and thought it looked nice. || Woman: No. I looked at a cake, and I nearly chose a bag of crisps, but the cake was too large and we already have plenty of crisps. [1]I bought some strawberries in the end[/1]. || Man: I think that was the right choice. It sounds more useful, and I think it will be appreciated. || Woman: I hope so. I kept the receipt, just in case it needs changing after we give it.
items.question: What did the speaker buy for the picnic?
